local_names.en: Chief Minister Chiranjeevi Health Insurance Scheme

income_thresholds.description: NFSA/BPL families: completely free, no premium. Non-NFSA families: Rs 850/year premium for same coverage.

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Rajasthan with a valid Jan Aadhaar card are eligible
Jan Aadhaar card (Rajasthan family ID) is mandatory. Without it, enrollment is not possible.

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in Jan Aadhaar card. All members listed on the Jan Aadhaar card are covered. No cap on family size. Coverage is floater across all members.

covered_procedures: Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spine surgery)
Organ transplant (kidney, liver, heart, bone marrow)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Jan Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Rajasthan-specific family identity card. This is MANDATORY — Aadhaar alone is not sufficient. Apply at E-Mitra if you don't have one.

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC and linking with Jan Aadhaar

required_documents.name: Ration Card (NFSA) — for free tier
required_documents.notes: Only required to avail the free (no premium) tier. Non-NFSA families can pay Rs 850/year premium.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Jan Aadhaar for OTP verification

required_documents.name: Bank Account Details — for premium tier
required_documents.notes: Required only for non-NFSA families paying the Rs 850/year premium via online payment

enrollment_channels: Gram Panchayat camp during enrollment drives
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Ensure you have a Jan Aadhaar card. If not, apply at the nearest E-Mitra kiosk first.
Step 2: For NFSA families: Registration is automatic if Jan Aadhaar is linked to NFSA ration card. Verify at chiranjeevi.rajasthan.gov.in.
Step 3: For non-NFSA families: Login to SSO Portal (sso.rajasthan.gov.in) or visit E-Mitra kiosk
Step 4: Select 'Chiranjeevi Yojana' and enter Jan Aadhaar number
Step 5: Complete e-KYC with Aadhaar biometric or OTP
Step 6: For non-NFSA families: Pay Rs 850/year premium online or at E-Mitra
Step 7: Digital policy card generated instantly. Print at E-Mitra if needed.
Step 8: Present Jan Aadhaar card at any empanelled hospital for cashless treatment up to Rs 25 lakh
description_for_embedding: Mukhyamantri Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana is Rajasthan's state health insurance scheme providing Rs 25 lakh per family per year. It is NOT a PM-JAY variant — Rajasthan runs this independently with higher coverage. Two enrollment paths: NFSA/BPL families get completely free coverage, while non-NFSA families pay just Rs 850 per year premium for the same Rs 25 lakh coverage. Covers 1,597 medical packages including organ transplants. Jan Aadhaar card (Rajasthan family ID) is mandatory. Enrollment via SSO Portal or E-Mitra kiosks. Helpline 181.
